skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, and video production for short-form content.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate AI video creation agent that integrates with the Pexo API. Static analysis detected shell command patterns (349 locations) that are all legitimate CLI tool operations for configuration checks, dependency verification, and API communication. Network access is restricted to pexo.ai API only. No evidence of credential exfiltration, data harvesting, or malicious code patterns after semantic evaluation.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Execution in Scripts
medium_findings.description: Scripts use shell command substitution for legitimate CLI operations including config file sourcing, API calls, and dependency checks. All commands are hardcoded or use controlled environment variables for Pexo API authentication.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Shell command patterns detected are standard CLI operations for a video API integration tool. Commands read config files, check dependencies, and make API calls - all legitimate use cases for a video creation skill.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded API Endpoints
low_findings.description: The skill references pexo.ai API endpoints in documentation and scripts. Network access is restricted to a single trusted service provider.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Hardcoded URLs point to the legitimate Pexo API service. No evidence of communication with arbitrary or suspicious endpoints.

low_findings.title: Hidden Configuration File Access
low_findings.description: Scripts access ~/.pexo/config for configuration. This is standard practice for API client tools and requires user action to create.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config file access is user-initiated setup. Users must create ~/.pexo/config with their API credentials - not automated credential harvesting.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Credentials
low_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL environment variables for API authentication.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API credential access is required for the Pexo service integration. Credentials are sent only to the pexo.ai API - no exfiltration detected.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Content creators and marketers struggle to produce consistent video content efficiently. This skill connects Claude to Pexo, an AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, and video production from simple text prompts.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) from text descriptions
Create videos in multiple aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) for different platforms
Upload reference images and videos as visual references for AI generation
Produce various video types including product ads, social clips, brand videos, and explainers
Support multilingual interaction - respond in the same language as the user
limitations: Requires a Pexo API key (free tier available at pexo.ai)
Cannot generate videos longer than 120 seconds
Cannot crawl web URLs - local files must be uploaded directly
Video quality and content are determined by Pexo's AI models, not user-controlled

use_cases.title: Quick Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create promotional videos for products by describing the product and target audience. Perfect for e-commerce sites, social media ads, and product launches.

use_cases.title: Social Media Content
use_cases.description: Generate short-form videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, or YouTube Shorts from a simple text description of the content concept.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Brand Video Production
use_cases.description: Produce brand videos and explainers that maintain consistent visual style and messaging. Ideal for company websites, pitch decks, and marketing campaigns.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Video Request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a video about [topic description]
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic video generation with minimal guidance

prompt_templates.title: Product Advertisement
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a product video for [product name] targeting [audience]. The product [key features and benefits].
prompt_templates.scenario: Product marketing with target audience and feature highlights

prompt_templates.title: Reference Image Enhancement
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a video using [uploaded image] as visual reference. The video should show [scene description].
prompt_templates.scenario: Using uploaded assets to guide video generation

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Preview Selection
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate [video concept]. Present multiple preview options for me to choose from before finalizing.

output_examples.input: I want a product video for running shoes
output_examples.output: A 30-second video showcasing the running shoes with dynamic motion shots, energetic background music, and text overlays highlighting key features like cushioning and breathability.

output_examples.input: Create a TikTok video about our new coffee blend
output_examples.output: A 15-second vertical video with close-up shots of coffee preparation, steam effects, and energetic transitions suitable for social media engagement.

best_practices: Be specific about the video purpose and target audience for better results
Let Pexo ask clarifying questions - its professional judgment improves video quality
Use uploaded reference images when you have specific visual style requirements
anti_patterns: Do not add technical parameters like duration or aspect ratio that the user did not request
Do not modify the user's message - copy it exactly when communicating with Pexo
Do not provide creative direction beyond what the user explicitly stated

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes, you need a Pexo API key. Sign up at pexo.ai to get a free API key. The skill requires PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL to be set.

faq.question: What video formats and lengths are supported?
faq.answer: Videos can be 5 to 120 seconds long. Supported aspect ratios are 16:9 (YouTube), 9:16 (TikTok/Instagram), and 1:1 (square).

faq.question: Can I use my own images or videos as references?
faq.answer: Yes, upload local files using pexo-upload.sh and reference them in your message using tags like <original-image>asset_id</original-image>.

faq.question: What if my video request is vague?
faq.answer: Pass the request to Pexo as-is. Pexo will ask clarifying questions to ensure the video meets your needs.

faq.question: Can I generate videos in languages other than English?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill responds in whatever language you use. Pexo generates video content based on your descriptions.

faq.question: What happens if video generation fails?
faq.answer: Check the error message and run pexo-doctor.sh to diagnose setup issues. Common causes include invalid API keys, insufficient credits, or network problems.
